description: Premier Housewares Silver Chefs Blow Torch, Height 17 cm x Width 8 cm x Depth 7 cm Enhance your cooking skills with the chef's blow torch. The sleek Silver design is lightweight yet robust with grooves on the torch for a better grip. An adjustable flame with easy ignition button will help the less experienced feel more comfortable when using. Simple to refill with a standard butane gas can, you can use the blow torch for many meals. Ideal for making crème brulee, turning sugar into caramel or charring your vegetables, the versatile chef's blow torch is suitable for all occasions. The refillable butane blow torch is easy and simple to use with an electronic sparker. Can be used in the kitchen, garage or for soldering.Fitted with a wide base to prevent torch from falling over. Special feature, - protective hand guard ensuring your utmost safety. - To light torch one must first release security knob to prevent accidental ignition! - No butane gas canisters included. - Comfortable gas torch to hold enabling you to maneuver the flame torch easily in any direction.
